title: Implement Shell Session Management
description: Build the shell session manager that spawns and manages terminal sessions. Support zsh and bash, inherit user's environment variables, handle session lifecycle (start, stop, restart). Each session should have a unique identifier for multi-terminal support.
acceptance_criteria: Shell spawns with user's default shell
Session state tracked with unique IDs
agent_output: Shell session management volledig geïmplementeerd met PTY support, multi-session management, en async I/O. Build succesvol.
